staticText: Open the browser-local crypto portfolio snapshot only. It supports NGN or ZAR and values separate acquisition lots only when the verified crypto-prices endpoint supplies fresh CoinGecko rows. P/L applies only to lots with known all-in cost and must retain its cost-coverage label. Never request, infer, prefill or transmit holdings, quantities, acquisition costs, dates, wallet addresses or exchange identifiers. Never invent prices, currency conversions, tax outcomes, portfolio scores, recommendations or allocations. If a market row is unavailable or outside the freshness contract, dependent values must remain unavailable.
